name: dalaly
description: Local desktop real-estate listings manager for Iraqi brokerage offices.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n renderer,desktop -c cyan,green "pnpm --filter @dalaly/renderer dev" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && pnpm --filter @dalaly/desktop dev"
scripts.build: pnpm build:server && pnpm build:renderer && pnpm assert:dist-assets
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter @dalaly/server clean && pnpm --filter @dalaly/renderer clean && pnpm --filter @dalaly/desktop clean
